game_version.description: Archive/Model input version consumed from RSDWArchive and RSDWModel.

addon_version.description: Blender add-on package version used for release zip naming.

resource_profile.description: Future worker/resource preset. Current command accepts explicit worker flags instead.

quality_policy.description: strict fails missing required icons; tolerant allows known missing required icons and records the policy.

git_mode.description: Publish behavior requested by the master pipeline.

build_local.notes: Builds local targets, staged extension data, asset library outputs, browser index, reports, and git file-size audit. Does not package, sync portable Blender, commit, or push unless extra flags are supplied.

validate_local.notes: Runs existing quality, browser-index, and file-size validators against current local outputs. Writes only PipelineLogs and PipelineRun.json.

package.notes: Release-safe packaging of the existing staged extension. Fails if the stage has no generated .blend asset files.

sync_portable.notes: Copies the current staged extension into the configured portable Blender extension directory.

publish.notes: Runs publish preflight, then git plan/commit/push according to git_mode. No build or package work is performed.

resume.notes: Current resume mode reuses existing asset/progress skip behavior and never cleans stage unless --clean-stage is explicitly supplied. Rich PipelineState reuse policy remains planned.

publish_git_modes.plan-only: Create GitCommitPlan.json without staging, committing, or pushing.
publish_git_modes.commit-only: Create commit batches locally without pushing.
publish_git_modes.push-each: Create each commit batch and push after each commit.
